description: Redesign the AxonRouter provider page to follow OmniRoute's layout patterns (category pills with counts, search bar, test-all button, collapsible sections, inline test per card) while maintaining AxonRouter's minimalist shadcn/ui style. Also simplify ProviderCategoryBadge to a colored dot instead of a full badge. The current page at src/app/(dashboard)/dashboard/providers/page.tsx is 962 lines with flat sections. The redesign adds: (1) a header row with search input + test-all button, (2) category filter pills with provider counts per category, (3) collapsible sections grouped by category with section-level test buttons, (4) cleaner card layout with category dot, service kind chips, and inline test. Remove verbose labels and redundant text.
steps: Read the current ProviderFilterBar.tsx and redesign it to show category pills with counts. Each pill should show a colored dot + category label + count badge (e.g. 'OAuth 7'). Use shadcn/ui Button variant='outline' for inactive and variant='default' for active. Categories: All, Free, OAuth, API Key, Free Tier, Web Cookie, Compatible, Local.

Replace ProviderCategoryBadge.tsx with a simple CategoryDot component: a small colored circle (size-2 rounded-full) that indicates the provider's category via color. Follow the pattern in OmniRoute's CategoryDot.tsx but use Tailwind classes. Remove the full text Badge.

Redesign the main page (src/app/(dashboard)/dashboard/providers/page.tsx): (a) Replace the current header with a compact row: 'Providers' title on left, search Input (shadcn) + 'Test All' Button on right. (b) Replace flat sections with collapsible sections using shadcn Collapsible component. Each section has: a header row with section title + count + section test button, and a collapsible grid of provider cards. (c) Wire the category filter pills to show/hide sections. (d) Remove the credentials backup card from the top of the page (move it to a dropdown or remove entirely from this view).

Update ProviderCards.tsx: (a) Replace ProviderCategoryBadge usage with the new CategoryDot. (b) Add service kind chips (small shadcn badges showing 'Chat', 'Embed', 'Image', 'TTS' etc.) derived from provider.serviceKinds. (c) Ensure every card has an inline test button (the Zap icon button already exists, just ensure it's always rendered, not conditionally). (d) Keep the toggle on hover behavior.

Ensure all providers are rendered regardless of category filter when filter is 'All'. When a specific category is selected, only show providers matching that category. Search should filter across all visible providers by name/id.
Remove verbose section descriptions and unnecessary explanatory text. Keep the page clean: title, filter pills, search, cards. No long paragraph descriptions.
Ensure the Web Cookie providers section (currently commented out) is re-enabled and included in the category system.
acceptance_criteria: Provider page has a compact header with title + search + test-all button
Category filter pills show colored dots and provider counts
ProviderCategoryBadge is replaced by a simple colored dot (CategoryDot)
Provider cards show service kind chips when applicable
Every provider card has an inline test button
Collapsible sections group providers by category
Web Cookie providers are visible (not commented out)
Search filters providers by name across all sections
